title: Software Developer
dailyRoutine: Coding features and fixing backend/frontend bugs
Writing unit tests and code reviews
Collaborating with product managers and DevOps teams

outcomes.title: Junior Developer
outcomes.description: Learning phase, focus on DSA, languages, and writing clean code

outcomes.title: Developer
outcomes.description: Got 1-2 appraisals, leading sub-features, API integrations

outcomes.title: Senior Developer
outcomes.description: Leading projects, writing system architectures, mentoring juniors

outcomes.title: Tech Lead
outcomes.description: Managing teams, aligning business specs, cross-team sync

outcomes.title: Engineering Manager
outcomes.description: High growth track, budgets, resource planning, org level execution

title: Frontend Developer
dailyRoutine: Build UI screens from Figma or product requirements
Write React components and connect APIs
Fix responsive bugs and performance issues
Review pull requests and collaborate with backend/design teams

outcomes.title: Junior Frontend Developer
outcomes.description: React basics, UI implementation, bug fixing, and portfolio building

outcomes.title: Frontend Developer
outcomes.description: Owns pages, API flows, state management, and production fixes

outcomes.title: Strong Frontend Engineer
outcomes.description: TypeScript, performance, design systems, testing, and interview readiness

outcomes.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
outcomes.description: Leads UI architecture, mentoring, accessibility, and scalable component systems

outcomes.title: Frontend Lead / Full-stack Bridge
outcomes.description: Owns product surfaces, frontend architecture, and cross-team delivery

title: Government Services
dailyRoutine: 8-10 hours of focused textbook and newspaper reading
Solving mock test papers and previous years papers
Writing essay answers and seeking feedback

outcomes.title: Preparation
outcomes.description: Full-time study, notes formulation, syllabus walkthrough

outcomes.title: Exam Attempts
outcomes.description: Multiple exams (prelims/mains level attempts)

outcomes.title: Selection
outcomes.description: Job offer received, document verification, joining call

outcomes.title: Probation
outcomes.description: Confirmed post, field training, early postings

outcomes.title: Established
outcomes.description: Job security, administrative responsibility, benefits

title: Entrepreneurship
dailyRoutine: Pitching to potential clients and collecting feedback
Coding the MVP or guiding design/dev iteration
Managing cash flow and applying for grants/pitches
Recruiting early hires and alignment meetings

outcomes.title: Idea and MVP
outcomes.description: Building product, talking to users, validating thesis

outcomes.title: Market Entry
outcomes.description: First customers, early revenue or scaling challenges

outcomes.title: Pivot or Growth
outcomes.description: Critical phase, raising seed capital, finding product-market fit

outcomes.title: Scaling
outcomes.description: If survived: building leadership team, marketing campaigns

outcomes.title: Founder
outcomes.description: Success exit, stable cash cow, or starting the next venture
